title: syzygium robustum
intro: Syzygium robustum, also known as the Malabar Neem or Malabar Cedarwood, is a plant species native to the Western Ghats region of India and Sri Lanka. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Syzygium robustum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
